title: Parity Validation + CI/QA + Docs (All Domain Services)

integration_points.change: Add docs/**/artifacts/** to ignores to exclude documentation TS artifacts from lint
integration_points.impact: Prevents lint failures on non-production examples; preserves zero-warning policy for source.

integration_points.change: Use validateClarificationResponse() instead of raw cast in parsePlanningClarifications
integration_points.impact: Fixes TS typecheck error; enforces schema validation for planning clarifications.

integration_points.change: Add Environment Variables section documenting PLANNING_URL, REPAIR_URL, EXECUTOR_URL, CLARIFICATION_URL
integration_points.impact: Documents proxy controls for domain services.

planned_commands: cd services/planning && npm run validate:all && cd ../../
cd services/repair && npm run validate:all && cd ../../
cd services/executor && npm run validate:all && cd ../../
cd services/clarification && npm run validate:all && cd ../../
unset PLANNING_URL REPAIR_URL EXECUTOR_URL CLARIFICATION_URL && npm run validate:all
risks: Excluding docs artifacts from lint should not mask real source issues; pattern is narrowly scoped.
Validation error messages for /decompose clarifications become more explicit — behavior compatible.
